checks.name: lint (oxlint)
hints: Run `bun install` if this is a fresh checkout
Use `bun run lint` locally before pushing changes

checks.name: format (oxfmt)
hints: Run `bun run format` to apply the same formatter output used in dustbucket

checks.name: coverage
hints: Run `bun run test:coverage` locally to see the coverage report
100% coverage is required for lines, functions, branches, and statements before committing
